profile.name: Leonardo Diaz
profile.title: Senior Frontend Developer | React · Angular · TypeScript | Gen AI & LLM Integration | JavaScript · Node.js
profile.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 8+ years of experience building modern, high-performance web applications for international teams and U.S.-based companies. I specialize in responsive, accessible interfaces with strong frontend architecture and growing Gen AI integration work.
profile.about: I have worked across the full frontend lifecycle: architecture decisions, component systems, performance optimization, and close collaboration with UX, backend, and product teams. I am comfortable owning complex features end to end and communicating clearly in English across remote, cross-functional environments. What drives me is building software that is both technically solid and genuinely useful, especially where modern frontend meets AI-assisted development.

highlights: Built custom HTML5 advertising formats for production campaigns across multiple browsers and devices.
Created reusable JavaScript component patterns that reduced banner implementation time.
Improved animation performance and frontend rendering quality for campaign delivery.
Connected frontend rendering flows with backend APIs and automated asset-processing steps.
Delivered frontend solutions for a wide range of client needs, from websites to immersive digital interfaces.
Translated client visions into tangible user experiences with a strong focus on performance and usability.
Worked across the full development cycle, from planning and architecture to launch and iteration.
Continued expanding into AI-assisted workflows and modern frontend tooling while maintaining client delivery.
Implemented frontend/UI work for product-facing features in a cross-functional delivery environment.
Supported clean user-facing experiences with an emphasis on detail and maintainability.
Worked with distributed teams and agile delivery practices across client engagements.
Collaborated closely with design teams and development teams during a dynamic product environment.
Contributed to redesign and refinement work, including homepage and static page implementation.
Handled debugging and frontend improvements as part of a broader rebranding effort.
Owned frontend implementation tasks focused on component assembly and interface polish.
Contributed directly to better UI and UX outcomes across product interfaces.
Helped structure frontend work for consistent user-facing delivery.
Contributed frontend development work in a collaborative agency environment.
Supported delivery across marketing-oriented digital products and experiences.

Built data extraction and automation flows for analytics and business monitoring tasks.
Used SQL and scraping pipelines to clean and structure decision-ready datasets.
Collaborated remotely on data quality, automation reliability, and reporting workflows.
Analyzed operational and web datasets to produce practical business insights.
Designed scraping and ETL routines to consolidate data from multiple sources.
Improved reporting quality through cleaner transformations and repeatable workflows.
Provided technical support and hands-on assistance across internal operations.
